howToBook.title: How to Book
howToBook.intro: Booking your private session takes just a few steps using the Octiv Fitness app.
steps: Download the Octiv Fitness mobile application from the App Store or Google Play Store.
Open the app and log in or create your personal member account.
Search for our gym within the app's facility directory.
Choose your preferred training session, date, and time slot.
Confirm your reservation and arrive ready for your workout!

faq.title: Rules & FAQ
rules: Always use a clean towel on the equipment during exercises.
Re-rack all weights and return equipment to its proper place after use.
Proper athletic footwear and apparel must be worn at all times.
Respect other members and maintain an appropriate noise level.

items.q: How do I enter the gym once I book a session?
items.a: After booking you receive a unique digital PIN code. Enter it on the keypad at your slot's start time to unlock the door — no staff, no keys, fully automated.

items.q: Can I bring a friend or a personal trainer?
items.a: Yes. You rent the entire space, so you can train alone, bring a friend, or come with your personal trainer at no extra charge — it's your private session.

items.q: How is hygiene maintained between sessions?
items.a: We schedule a cleaning and sanitization window between every booking, so the equipment and floor are professionally wiped down and ready before you arrive.
Each private gym includes a power rack and barbell, a full dumbbell set, benches, cardio machines, kettlebells and functional accessories — everything for a complete strength or conditioning workout.

items.q: Can I play my own music?
items.a: Absolutely. Every space has an integrated Bluetooth sound system — connect your phone and set the atmosphere exactly how you like it.
